name: Portfolio
shortDescription: My personal portfolio — built with Next.js, TypeScript and shadcn/ui. Data-driven via JSON files.
longDescription: This very site. The goal was to have a portfolio that is trivial to update: just edit a JSON file and push.

name: Project Alpha
shortDescription: A CLI tool that automates repetitive Git workflows for mono-repos.
longDescription: Supports conventional commits, automatic changelog generation and semantic versioning out of the box.

name: Old Experiment
shortDescription: An early experiment with WebSockets and real-time data visualisation.
